A.evidence: Faithful prose and pristine LaTeX, but truncated earliest (mid-4.2, page 5) and GitHub-anchor link clutter in intro.

B.evidence: Cleanest render: faithful prose, proper LaTeX, reaches section 5; only minor repeated running headers.

C.evidence: Complete to 5.1 with usable spaced LaTeX; OCR typos (Kalchbrneren, Eneco) and a spurious 'Line chart' line.

D.evidence: Good prose and LaTeX but a large raw JSON bbox layout dump embedded mid-document; wrong arXiv version tag.

E.evidence: Clean faithful prose but equations garbled: merged Eq.(2), asterisks replacing alphas and arrows, broken alpha sum.

F.evidence: Broken: <|LOC_..|> tokens throughout, hallucinated text, massive duplicated/looped lines.

G.evidence: Clean faithful prose and good LaTeX, reaches page 6; minor flaw: backward-RNN arrow glyph rendered same as forward.

H.evidence: Prose faithful but nearly all equations dropped as formula-not-decoded; garbled char fragments and jumbled figure-axis dump at end.
